sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26966" key="dikomaxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐκο-μᾰχέω</orth>, <sense id="n26966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry on a lawsuit,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.29</biblScope> </bibl> (vulg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀδικ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
